_meta: Spec for the healthcare industry review package (L033), issue-code lens (healthcare is ALI-code-visible, unlike crypto). Baselines against the POST-FIX package (entity_aliases fan-out fix, commit edc3bcd 2026-07-11) — the activity_share module carries the corrected §4-safe DISTINCT alias join. Dashboard keeps its bespoke hc_page.js via the legacy viz_build assembly. The giving split (hc_ld203_recipients_split.csv) and P6 audit/rollup files are enhance/retrofit-pipeline products passed through from the baseline.
title: Healthcare Lobbying — State of the Industry
subtitle: The largest standing lobbying operation in Washington: who the players are, what kind of health issues they file on, which bills they crowd onto, and who the industry gives money to.
